tweets.content: RT by @elonmusk: The real class war is between the productive class and the parasitic class.
tweets.translated: RT @elonmusk：真正的阶级战争发生在生产阶级和寄生阶级之间。

tweets.content: RT by @elonmusk: BREAKING: Kazakhstan Railways is bringing Starlink internet to 900 train carriages this summer. • By July, around 900 train carriages will be equipped with Starlink internet. • The service will cover nearly 50 passenger routes across the country. • KTZ’s passenger fleet has about 2,211 units, with the goal of full network coverage by autumn. • The rollout is being done in stages as part of Kazakhstan’s railway transport modernization program • Starlink was first tested on the Burabay Express electric train in 2025. • Satellite internet has also been introduced on other major routes, including Astana–Ust-Kamenogorsk and Astana–Almaty Talgo trains. Starlink is proving again that high-speed satellite internet can transform travel, especially across large countries and remote routes.
tweets.translated: RT @elonmusk：突发新闻：哈萨克斯坦铁路公司将于今年夏天为 900 个火车车厢提供 Starlink 互联网。 • 到7 月，大约900 节火车车厢将配备Starlink 互联网。 • 服务将覆盖全国近50条客运航线。 • KTZ 客运车队规模约为 2,211 辆，目标是到秋季实现网络全覆盖。 • 作为哈萨克斯坦铁路运输现代化计划的一部分，该计划正在分阶段进行。 • Starlink 于 2025 年在 Burabay Express 电动列车上首次进行测试。 • 其他主要线路也引入了卫星互联网，包括阿斯塔纳 - 乌斯季卡缅诺戈尔斯克和阿斯塔纳 - 阿拉木图 Talgo 列车。星链再次证明高速卫星互联网可以改变旅行方式，尤其是跨越大国和偏远路线的旅行方式。

tweets.content: Pinned: POLL: ICE has been abused by the Fake News Media at levels never seen before. They are Great Patriots who work hard, and do a fantastic job in a very hostile environment. Much of this hostility is caused by the Dumocrats and the Fake News. The concept I have had for quite some time — A strong feeling that the name of these Patriots, “ICE,” should be changed to, “NICE,” in that it will totally discombobulate Crooked, Dishonest, and Unpatriotic Reporters and Journalists. For them to say, “We went to a NICE Facility today,” as opposed to “ICE” or, “NICE Agents have deported a Violent Drug Dealer,” they won’t be able to handle it, they will go totally crazy! All it means is adding an “N” (“National”) to “ICE (“Immigration and Customs Enforcement”) — A much more prestigious name. Everyone loves it, but I have been told by the legendary Tom Homan that the Agents do not love it as much as the other population. Who thinks that we should add an “N” to change the name of “ICE” to “NICE?”   Thank you for your attention to this matter! President DJT
tweets.translated: 已固定：民意调查：假新闻媒体对 ICE 的滥用达到了前所未有的程度。他们是伟大的爱国者，他们努力工作，在非常恶劣的环境中做得非常出色。这种敌意很大程度上是由杜民主派和假新闻引起的。我有一段时间一直有这样的想法——一种强烈的感觉，这些爱国者的名字“ICE”应该改为“NICE”，因为这将彻底扰乱不诚实、不诚实、不爱国的记者和记者。对于他们来说，“我们今天去了一家 NICE 设施”，而不是“ICE”或“NICE 特工驱逐了一名暴力毒贩”，他们将无法处理，他们会完全疯掉！这意味着在“ICE”（“移民和海关执法局”）中添加一个“N”（“国家”）——一个更有声望的名字。每个人都喜欢它，但传奇人物汤姆·霍曼告诉我，特工们并不像其他人那样喜欢它。谁认为我们应该添加一个“N”来将“ICE”的名字改为“NICE”？   感谢您对此事的关注！总裁DJT

tweets.content: The $WEN meme traders made it to Global Media from Japan to US! The burger fast food chain is now up ~50%, which is pretty impressive. Feels bad to be sidelined and see my AI memory/optical portfolio perform worse than a $RDDT memestock tho. Did anyone take positions?
tweets.translated: $WEN 表情包交易者成功登陆从日本到美国的 Global Media！汉堡快餐连锁店现在上涨了约 50%，这是相当令人印象深刻的。看到我的 AI 内存/光学投资组合表现比 $RDDT memestock 还差，被边缘化感觉很糟糕。有人上岗了吗？

tweets.content: Global markets in a nutshell: Japanese Company: Active monopoly over random chokepoints in the hyperscaler AI buildout. Valuation: $150m-$350M Silicon Valley: Here's a $200m for a "Seed Round".
tweets.translated: 全球市场简而言之：日本公司：对超大规模人工智能建设中的随机瓶颈的积极垄断。估值：1.5 亿至 3.5 亿美元 硅谷：“种子轮”融资 2 亿美元。

tweets.content: Very interesting statement today: $MU CEO predicts a multi-decade memory demand cycle driven by humanoid robots. "Humanoid robots, he says, will require roughly ten times more memory than today’s Level 2+ autonomous vehicles." "And that demand wave is set to begin before the decade is out." Something as well as was "Over time, we expect the value of on-device AI combined with pent-up unit replacement demand to drive memory demand growth" Which is also another trend (Apple Intelligence is currently dog, but I'm sure we'll see innovations with localized/edge AI). Feels like all the industry leaders from $TSM Chairman, $TSLA Elon Musk, to $MU CEO see humanoids as the next major trend so physical AI is probably next. I wonder if the world is going to have enough memory. Or if we'll see enough breakthroughs to shrink memory usage.
tweets.translated: 今天非常有趣的声明：$MU 首席执行官预测人形机器人将驱动数十年的内存需求周期。 “他说，人形机器人需要的内存大约是当今 2+ 级自动驾驶汽车的十倍。” “这种需求浪潮将在这个十年结束之前开始。”还有一点是“随着时间的推移，我们预计设备上人工智能的价值与被压抑的单元更换需求相结合，将推动内存需求增长”，这也是另一个趋势（Apple Intelligence 目前处于困境，但我相信我们会看到本地化/边缘人工智能的创新）。感觉从 $TSM 董事长、$TSLA Elon Musk 到 $MU 首席执行官的所有行业领导者都将类人机器人视为下一个主要趋势，因此物理人工智能可能是下一个。我想知道世界是否有足够的内存。或者我们是否会看到足够的突破来减少内存使用。
